message:
fix: proper mobile layout with responsive CSS classes

Replace fragile [style*="..."] selectors with proper CSS classes
added to JS-generated HTML. Mobile overrides now use semantic
class names instead of matching inline style strings.

New responsive classes:
- .big-number: 48px desktop → 32px mobile
- .metric-grid: auto-fit → 3-col mobile
- .detail-grid-3: 3-col → 1-col mobile
- .result-grid-5: 5-col → 3-col mobile
- .result-grid-4: 4-col → 2-col mobile
- .result-grid-2: 2-col → 1-col mobile
- .attr-grid: 100px label → 70px mobile
- .mobile-stack: flex-row → flex-column mobile

Applied to 21 elements across exhibits. Removed duplicate 640px
breakpoints now handled in the main 768px block. Cancel state
machine and region tree use overflow-x:auto containers so they
scroll horizontally on mobile instead of being squished.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
